narrative:
Hartford Twp township has 982 registered voters, with 46.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.7 percentage points.
